title: Spirogyra gelatin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Spirogyra gelatin''' was a food delicacy enjoyed by [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]]. The chef droid [[L9-G8]] instructed the rebel crew of the ''[[Bonderium]]'' to cook this dish for an Ugorian feast, in order to bribe [[ArrGack]] and [[GrrKack]] for admission to the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Spirogyra|Spirogyra]] are a kind of real-world green algae.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
